home.subtitle: Guess movies, beat the clock, build your streak and unlock cinema challenges

rules.label: Rules
rules.aria: Read the rules of the game

settings.title: Settings
settings.fontSize: Change the size of the font

play.pageDescription: Select a game mode & difficulty to start a new quiz session

leaderboard.message: Play a Classic mode game and click "End Game & Save Score"
leaderboard.confirmClear: Are you sure you want to clear all scores? This cannot be undone.

rules.subTitle: Know each mode, difficulty and rules

classic.title: Classic mode
classic.desc: Play to your own rhythm, without clock nor stress
classic.point1: Guess the titles based on the pictures
classic.point4: Use the button to end the session and save the statistics

beatClock.title: Beat-the-clock
beatClock.desc: Compete against the clock to guess {count} movies in {min} minutes.

streak.title: Longest streak
streak.desc: Keep the streak flowing to win

lines.easy: Reach a streak of {count} correct answers

investigation.title: Investigation mode
investigation.desc: The poster is blurred. Answer questions to reveal details.
investigation.mech2: Wrong answers = re‑blur parts of the image
investigation.note: This mode will be implemented last.

jokers.title: How do jokers work?
jokers.desc: Each mode has unique jokers, usable a limited number of times depending on difficulty
jokers.str1: Allow one mistake without breaking streak
jokers.inv2: Get a hint for a question
jokers.inv3: Get the correct answer for one question

stats.title: Game session and statistics
stats.s1: Score, streak, attempts and time are saved
stats.s2: Data stored locally in your browser
stats.s3: Leaderboard sorted by score, time or date
stats.s4: Skip a movie if you don’t know the answer

accessibility.title: Accessibility and settings
accessibility.a4: Full screen reader and keyboard navigation support
